# Instructions
- do not make text changes unless explicitly asked to do so
- do not change file names

# Writing Style
- suggestions should be in an academic tone and style with a focus on clarity, coherence and conciseness

# Content Suggestions
- make suggestions with respect to the marking rubrice comments provided in the original brief
- make suggestions that follow this pattern where a 'low' value response would a description of the idea, followed by justification, analysis and finally evaluation getting the top marks.
